subcodes.first_line: O 'Attar! Upon thee be the glory of the Chosen One! My Greater Branch hath presented thy letter and read it before My face [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا عطار علیک بهاء المختار قد حضر غصنی الاکبر بکتابک و قراه امام الوجه
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers
